'''Fleyars IV''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in its system. It was the location of the [[Battle of Fleyars IV]], in which the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] subjugated the planet. The hero of the Battle was [[Akal Zed]], whom took over command of the ''[[Seswennan Nightcloak]]'' when his captain was killed.

==Behind the scense==
In ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', there was an entry on Fleyars IV, which says that it was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] in the [[Battle of Fleyars IV]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
